reviewDescription: The electrician arrived right on time and fixed our wiring issue cleanly. Booking was simple and the follow-up call made us feel genuinely cared for.
I booked the Mehendi service and was very satisfied. The artist was skilled, professional, and the design came out beautiful and neat. Great experience overall
Metro Sewa helped me with urgent plumbing work in the evening. The technician explained everything clearly and solved it without extra hassle.
